holdings.infoBox: VFQY is an equity ETF with a total of 409 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fortinet stock at 1.77%, KLA Corporation at 1.73%, Lam Research at 1.71%, Adobe at 1.68%, and Apple at 1.65%.

overview.description: The Vanguard U.S. Quality Factor ETF (VFQY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund of US equities featuring strong fundamentals. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation. VFQY was launched on Feb 13, 2018 and is issued by Vanguard.
